reasoning: The 2025 release calendar is heavily dominated by mega-franchises, with "Avatar: Fire and Ash" being the most prominent. Given the historical performance of the Avatar films (both previous entries grossing over $2.3 billion worldwide), it is the overwhelming favorite to take the top spot globally. Even in the highly unlikely event that Avatar 3 underperforms or gets delayed outside the tracking window, other highly anticipated releases like "Jurassic World Rebirth", "Mission: Impossible - The Final Reckoning", and various MCU/Disney sequels act as an incredibly strong safety net. Based on the resolution criteria (which strictly checks if the movie is part of a series or cinematic universe), the odds of an original, non-franchise film making more than $1.5 billion to rival these juggernauts in 2025 are vanishingly small.
